abilities.description: Spectre flings a dagger to draw a Shadow Path, dealing damage and slowing the movement speed of any enemies along the trail. Units hit by the dagger also trail a Shadow Path. While treading the path, Spectre phases through otherwise impassable terrain. Spectral Dagger applies an instance of Desolate to targets with no allied units within 400 radius of them.
abilities.name: Spectral Dagger
abilities.story: Mercurial's dagger eclipses the physical plane in shadow, a state in which mortals cower, but spectres thrive.

abilities.description: Deals bonus damage whenever Spectre attacks an enemy that does not have any allied units within a 400 radius around them.
abilities.name: Desolate
abilities.story: Often times, warriors find themselves alone with a vision of Mercurial - the fated question is if it is the true Spectre.

abilities.description: Damage done to Spectre is reflected on her enemies, leaving her unharmed. The effect lessens with distance.
params: Passive ComponentMin Radius: 300Max Radius: 800Damage Reflected: 8%/12%/16%/20% ([picture:talent_tree_symbol] 13%/17%/21%/25%)Damage Reduction: 8%/12%/16%/20% ([picture:talent_tree_symbol] 13%/17%/21%/25%)
abilities.name: Dispersion
abilities.story: A daunting task lies before enemies of Mercurial - killing a shadow with blade and magic.

abilities.description: Spectre exchanges places with a chosen Haunt and casts the current level of Spectral Dagger on the haunt's Target.
abilities.name: Reality
abilities.story: The scattered shadows unite into the one true Spectre.

abilities.description: Creates a spectral nemesis to attack each enemy hero. At any moment during the duration, Spectre can use Reality to exchange places of a given haunt.
abilities.name: Haunt
abilities.story: At the height of combat, Mercurial's physical manifestation shatters, and the shadowy pieces haunt those who still cling to life.

abilities.description: Creates a spectral nemesis to haunt a single visible enemy hero. At any moment during the duration, Spectre can use Reality to exchange places of a given haunt. Haunt illusions are uncontrollable, take extra damage, and deal less damage than Spectre herself. They ignore terrain.
abilities.name: Shadow Step
abilities.story: With great focus of will, Mercurial can sometimes limit the extent of her division.

description: Haunts her enemies and teleports to her target. An eternal being of violent energies, Mercurial, the Spectre is irresistibly drawn to conflict. Throwing out a Spectral Dagger, creating a shadowy trail to her foes in which she may travel unobstructed. Harm done to Mercurial is partially deflected and Dispersed onto nearby foes that prolongs her endurance. Even in the most Desolate wilderness, travelers are Haunted by visions of Spectre, seeming to prey on their solitude. But these are no mere illusions. It is said that for one in every five haunted, the apparition becomes Reality, and alongside these unfortunate victims the Spectre Shadow Steps to, bringing with her the destruction and wrath that she eternally craves.  Carry Durable Escape  Female, Undead Legs ( 0 )
trivia: The name Mercurial most likely comes from the DeviantART account of Kenneth Tan, the person who made the 6.28-6.32 loadscreen.[1][2] 6.28 is also the version in which Spectre got released in DotA.
